data.question: How many clubs are there?
data.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM club

data.question: List the name of clubs in ascending alphabetical order.
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club ORDER BY Name ASC

data.question: What are the managers and captains of clubs?
data.sql: SELECT Manager ,  Captain FROM club

data.question: List the name of clubs whose manufacturer is not "Nike"
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Manufacturer != "Nike"

data.question: What are the names of players in ascending order of wins count?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM player ORDER BY Wins_count ASC

data.question: What is the name of the player with the highest earnings?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM player ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: What are the distinct countries of players with earnings higher than 1200000?
data.sql: SELECT DISTINCT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  >  1200000

data.question: What is the country of the player with the highest earnings among players that have more than 2 win counts?
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Wins_count  >  2 ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: Show names of players and names of clubs they are in.
data.sql: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID

data.question: Show names of clubs that have players with more than 2 win counts.
data.sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID WHERE T2.Wins_count  >  2

data.question: Show names of players from the club with manager "Sam Allardyce".
data.sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID WHERE T1.Manager  =  "Sam Allardyce"

data.question: Show names of clubs in descending order of average earnings of players belonging.
data.sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID GROUP BY T1.Club_ID ORDER BY avg(T2.Earnings) DESC

data.question: Show different manufacturers and the number of clubs they are associated with.
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer ,  COUNT(*) FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer

data.question: Please show the most common manufacturer of clubs.
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: List the manufacturers that are associated with more than one club.
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

data.question: List the country that have more than one player.
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

data.question: List the name of clubs that do not have players.
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Club_ID NOT IN (SELECT Club_ID FROM player)

data.question: Show the country of players with earnings more than 1400000 and players with earnings less than 1100000.
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  >  1400000 INTERSECT SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  <  1100000

data.question: What is the number of distinct countries of all players?
data.sql: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT Country) FROM player

data.question: Show the earnings of players from country "Australia" or "Zimbabwe".
data.sql: SELECT Earnings FROM player WHERE Country  =  "Australia" OR Country  =  "Zimbabwe"
